channel.title: UT on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in UT on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Sevier County Sheriff’s Office (UT)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Sevier County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: November 4, 2025 County: Sevier County State: UT FIPS: 49041

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: GEO TRANSPORT, INC. — ICE SALT LAKE, UT $10,384,456
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: GEO TRANSPORT, INC. Award ID: 70CDCR26FR0000002 Amount: $10,384,455.59 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS AWARD IS TO PROVIDE GROUND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES IN SUPPORT OF ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS (ERO) IN THE SALT LAKE CITY (SLC) AREA OF RESPONSIBILITY (AOR). Period: 2026-01-09 to 2027-01-08 Location: SALT LAKE, UT (FIPS: 49035)

item.title: LIVEVIEW TECHNOLOGIES INC — ICE UTAH, UT $760,396
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: LIVEVIEW TECHNOLOGIES INC Award ID: 70CMSW26FR0000017 Amount: $760,396.00 Description: THIS AWARD LEASES 26 MOBILE SECURITY CAMERA TRAILER UNITS AT TEN HSI LOCATIONS FOR 12 MONTHS TO SUPPORT ICE- OFFICE OF HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS (HSI). Period: 2026-03-03 to 2027-03-02 Location: UTAH, UT (FIPS: 49049)

item.title: MANAGEMENT & TRAINING CORPORATION — ICE DAVIS, UT $14,553,814
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: MANAGEMENT & TRAINING CORPORATION Award ID: 70CDCR26FR0000010 Amount: $14,553,814.16 Description: TASK ORDER FOR DETENTION SERVICES, TRANSPORTATION SERVICES, FACILITY UPGRADES, DETAINEE WORK PROGRAM, AND CASE PROCESSING SPECIALISTS AT IMPERIAL REGIONAL DETENTION FACILITY IN SAN DIEGO, CA. Period: 2025-12-20 to 2026-12-19 Location: DAVIS, UT (FIPS: 49011)

item.title: MANAGEMENT & TRAINING CORPORATION — ICE DAVIS, UT $45,858,510
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: MANAGEMENT & TRAINING CORPORATION Award ID: 70CDCR24FR0000008 Amount: $45,858,510.27 Description: FUNDS FOR NEW TASK ORDER FOR IMPERIAL REGIONAL DETENTION FACILITY. Period: 2023-12-20 to 2024-12-19 Location: DAVIS, UT (FIPS: 49011)

item.title: MANAGEMENT & TRAINING CORPORATION — ICE DAVIS, UT $47,203,837
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: MANAGEMENT & TRAINING CORPORATION Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000012 Amount: $47,203,837.48 Description: DETENTION SERVICES Period: 2024-12-20 to 2025-12-19 Location: DAVIS, UT (FIPS: 49011)

item.description:
